title: LakeFSAssetComponent
description: Interact with a lakeFS repository for data versioning — supports commit, merge, and create_branch operations via the lakeFS REST API.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

lakefs_endpoint_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the lakeFS endpoint URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000).

access_key_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the lakeFS access key ID.

secret_key_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the lakeFS secret access key.

branch.description: Branch to commit to (commit mode) or source branch (merge/create_branch mode).

source_ref.description: Source ref (branch or commit SHA) for create_branch mode.

commit_message.description: Commit message used in commit mode.

metadata.description: Key-value metadata attached to the commit (commit mode only).
